nasb.text: Men will not break bread in mourning for them, to comfort anyone for the dead, nor give them a cup of consolation to drink for anyone’s father or mother.

esv.text: No one shall break bread for the mourner, to comfort him for the dead, nor shall anyone give him the cup of consolation to drink for his father or his mother.

cnv.text: 沒有人為哀悼的人擘餅，為死者安慰他們；喪父或喪母的人，都沒有人給他們喝一杯安慰酒。

ccb.text: 无人用食物和酒安慰哀悼者，甚至无人给丧父或丧母者一杯安慰酒。
